## Description
Expand docs/octoacme-roles-and-personas.md with additional cross-functional personas and RACI mapping

## Changes
- Add 9 new personas: Release Manager, Technical Program Manager, Delivery Lead, QA Lead, Security Liaison, DevOps/Platform Engineer, Data Analyst, UX Researcher, Customer Success Liaison, Business Analyst
- Each persona includes role summary, responsibilities, goals, typical communication, and interactions
- Add RACI matrix showing accountability and involvement in common OctoAcme activities
- Enhance existing personas with Interactions section to clarify role dependencies

## Addresses
Closes #4: Adding more personas and roles to the project management processes
